name: ndexagent biorxiv-daily-scan 2026-03-11
description: Daily bioRxiv scan for HPMI-relevant papers. Scan used web search fallback (bioRxiv API blocked by proxy). Found 8 new candidate papers not previously processed. 1 paper scored >= 0.6 for Tier 2 review. Note: coverage limited compared to full API scan.

v.name: The Incoming Influenza Genome Assembles a Host RBP Network
v.annotation: Maps ~700 host RBPs recruited by IAV genome via VIR-CLASP; identifies GMPS, TOP2A, SRRM2, SPEN as proviral factors

v.name: HA 162-164 deletions enhance influenza B/Victoria fitness and virulence
v.annotation: HA structural deletions enhance IBV fitness and in vivo virulence

v.name: Efficient replication of influenza D virus in human airway
v.annotation: IDV replicates efficiently in human airway epithelium; zoonotic potential

v.name: Innate antiviral readiness drives T stem cell memory against influenza
v.annotation: pDC-associated IFN-I signature predicts TSCM expansion and viral clearance

v.name: Hybrid alphavirus-influenza pseudovirions for neutralization quantification
v.annotation: Novel pseudovirus assay for H5N1 neutralization antibodies; tool paper

v.name: Emergence of H3N2 viruses with substitutions at positions 158 and 189
Recombinant H5N1 viruses expressing reporter proteins
v.annotation: Reporter viruses for H5N1 clade 2.3.4.4b; tool paper

v.name: H5 influenza virus mRNA-LNP vaccine in lactating dairy cows
v.annotation: mRNA vaccine evaluation in cattle; no novel HPMI mechanisms
